tasks.title: Unify dashboard token account presentation
tasks.objective: Update the combined dashboard so Account Tokens presents one token account instead of separate creator and participant token panels.
authority: Treat all displayed dashboard tokens as one account token type.
Keep the dashboard token states limited to Available, In use, and Used.
Do not change ledger accounting or token costs unless implementation proves the UI cannot be fixed without it.
Do not add feedback tasks to the main task ledger.
acceptance_criteria: The combined `/dashboard` Account Tokens section renders a single token summary, not separate Demo Creator and Demo Participant token panels.
The dashboard does not describe or visually divide tokens as creator tokens versus participant tokens.
Available, In use, and Used remain the only dashboard token states.
Created Cohorts and Interested Cohorts still render their existing cohort/event content.
Dashboard and MVP verification tests cover the unified token account presentation.
verification: Run `npm test -- tests/dashboards.test.mjs tests/mvp-verification.test.mjs` if supported, or run `npm test`.
Run `npm run check` before issue closeout.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when the dashboard presents one token account and verification passes.
tasks.evidence: 2026-05-31 08:19 EDT: Added a combined dashboard service result with a de-duplicated account token balance, rendered one Account Tokens summary on `/dashboard`, and updated dashboard/MVP tests to reject split Demo Creator/Demo Participant token panels. `npm test -- tests/dashboards.test.mjs tests/mvp-verification.test.mjs`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run check` passed; browser smoke confirmed `/dashboard` has one Account Tokens summary with no Demo Creator/Demo Participant token headings.
